svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="yOp2HciHiqw26PB4hnBa"> <mxGraphModel dx="1414" dy="749" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart TD
 subgraph Offline_Training [\"OFFLINE / TRAINING PATH\"]
 A[generate_data.py] --> B[customer_churn.csv]
 B --> C[preprocess.py]
 C --> D[train.py]
 subgraph Models
 D --> E[Logistic Regression]
 D --> F[Random Forest]
 end
 E & F --> G[MLflow]
 G --> H[best_model.joblib]
 end

 subgraph Online_Serving [\"ONLINE / SERVING PATH\"]
 I[Streamlit frontend.py] -- \"HTTP POST /predict\" --> J[FastAPI app/main.py]
 J -- \"in-process\" --> K[src/predict.py]
 K --> L[JSON response]
 end

 subgraph Deployment [\"DEPLOYMENT LAYER\"]
 M[Docker image: ml-pipeline]
 end

 H -.-> K
 M --- I
 M --- J
 M --- K",
 "config": null
